case_title: PAULINA FAYER VS. BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-22-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PAULINA FAYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED STUDENTS OF THE SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AMENDED THEIR CLAIM AND ERRONEOUSLY SUED AN INCORRECT PARTY TO THE ACTION. PLAINTIFF WILL AMEND THEIR CLAIM TO PROPERLY NAME THE DEFENDANT BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAYER, PAULINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY POLICE DEPARTMENT $549.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $549.00, DEFENDANT TRUE NAME, SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY POLICE DEPARTMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
